task: Fix conversational minion creation/edit flow across Forge, general chat, Telegram, and minion list/detail UI

focus: save existing minion instead of recreate-only
general chat should not clobber forge draft
telegram routing should be less strict
minion list pagination / larger inventory UX
implementedThisSlice: Forge edit button now routes to /forge?edit=<id>
Forge loads existing minion drafts from the edit query param
Save uses updateMinion for edit flows and postHadesMinion for new flows
General chat no longer overwrites the forge draft
Minion list now paginates 10 items per page
Scoped minion update/delete now carry tenantId
Added red tests for edit redirect, pagination, and scoped repo behavior
handoffForMini: Created handoff 014 for social command routing, minion v2 metadata, and Forge UI cleanup
Added intentionally failing red tests for /sendcat alias routing, Discord command normalization, metadata persistence, and Forge label helpers
No implementation for handoff 014 should be completed by Codex here; 5.4 mini should carry it out via TDD
implementedFollowupSlice: Added shared social command normalization so /sendcat, !sendcat, and bare sendcat resolve to the same minion command
Telegram minion execution now matches slash aliases and passes the normalized command into executeMinion
Discord bot runtime now normalizes social command names before Hermes and execution persistence
saveMinion now persists hades.minion.v2 metadata and version fields for scoped and in-memory saves
Forge draft panel now uses Trigger wording and save/update labels that match the new edit flow
Red tests from handoff 014 are now green
repositoryFollowup: Reviewed local minionRepository hydration diff and found it was reloading the full Supabase table on every read/write
Restored one-time hydration caching and added explicit refresh() for deliberate resync
Added repository tests covering one-time Supabase hydration and explicit refresh behavior
Wired refresh() into Telegram webhook runtime bootstrapping and scoped minion fallback lookup in minion assignment runtime
